title: Fix non-inlined interface tracing (#3984)
body:
As discussed in #3984, interface tracing is broken when inlining is turned off.  This is because I added the interface references in V3Inline (probably because that's when all the information was ready).  However, this interface tracking doesn't actually have anything to do with the inlining process, so the issue can be resolved by always running this visitor regardless of `-fno-inline`.

I'm not sure if this code should really continue to live in V3Inline.  If there's a better home for it please let me know and I'll move it there.
